shortest_path_length: The graph has a unique shortest path from node {source_label} to node {goal_label}. How many edges are in that path?
Following edges from node {source_label} to node {goal_label}, how many edges are in the unique shortest path?
What is the length, in edges, of the unique shortest path from {source_label} to {goal_label}?
Find the unique shortest path between nodes {source_label} and {goal_label}. How many edges does it contain?
How many edges lie on the unique shortest path from node {source_label} to node {goal_label}?
directed_shortest_path_length: There is a unique shortest path from node {source_label} to node {goal_label} when following the direction of the arrows. How many edges are in that path?
Following only arrow directions, how many edges are in the unique shortest path from {source_label} to {goal_label}?
What is the directed shortest-path length from node {source_label} to node {goal_label}?
Find the unique arrow-following shortest path from {source_label} to {goal_label}. How many edges does it contain?
How many directed edges lie on the unique shortest path from node {source_label} to node {goal_label}?
directed_longest_path_length: The directed graph has a unique longest directed path. How many edges are in that path?
Find the unique longest path when following arrow directions. How many directed edges does it contain?
What is the length, in directed edges, of the graph's unique longest path?
Among all arrow-following paths in the directed acyclic graph, the longest one is unique. How many edges are on it?
How many directed edges lie on the unique longest directed path in the graph?
